title: $finish doesn't end the simulation
body:
`verilator --version`: Verilator 5.036 2025-04-27 rev v5.036
OS: ArchLinux

I would expect `$finish` to always end the simulation even inside `always` block. But in this example Verilator keeps printing
```
- tb.sv:16: Verilog $finish
```
forever. It triggers when I have a DPI call inside a `while` condition with `@(posedge clk)`.

Here is a minimal example to reproduce the issue: [verilator_bug.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/19998247/verilator_bug.zip)

Use the following commands to run it:
```bash
make
verilator --binary tb.sv  <absolute path to the compiled lib.a>
obj_dir/Vtb
```
code_blocks:
- tb.sv:16: Verilog $finish
make
verilator --binary tb.sv  <absolute path to the compiled lib.a>
obj_dir/Vtb
